catchphrases: If it's in the press, it's in the price
If bonds freak out, everything breaks
Don't break something if it's simple and good
Temperament is the most important thing
Meta risk — everyone in same trade
Fuel pump panic = COVID toilet paper vibes

terms.dark pools: Institutional block trades executed off-exchange. Volume Leaders tracks these.
terms.gamma wall: Options strike price with concentrated open interest that acts as support/resistance due to dealer hedging
terms.put wall: Price level with heavy put OI — acts as support floor
terms.call wall: Price level with heavy call OI — acts as resistance ceiling
terms.breadth: Market participation width — RSP/SPY ratio, advance-decline line, % above 200 MA
terms.rotational play: Sector rotation trade based on relative value + flow shifts
terms.mean reversion zone: Weekly 20 MA — where price tends to return to
terms.the canary: Financials sector — early warning for economic health
terms.stock picker's market: Rangebound indices where sector/stock selection matters more than direction
terms.A+ setup: Trade where macro + flows + sentiment + technicals all align
terms.Inverse Cramer: Fading Jim Cramer's strong public calls as a contrarian signal
terms.waterfall event: Loss of major put wall at expiry triggers cascade selling as dealer hedges unwind
terms.late cycle signal: Leveraged ETF expansion, blow-off tops, defensive sector leadership
terms.meta risk: Everyone in the same trade — concentrated positioning across markets creates systemic unwind risk
